meaning: n.雍晄ｯ榊ｱ樒噪讀咲黄,雎ｹ郤ｹ陜ｶ
examples: The invention also discloses a method of manual cultivation of unibract fritillary bulbs.
The microtubule network of fritillary callus cell was showed through immunoenzymological technique.
They farmed the slopes and collected Chinese caterpillar fungus and fritillary butterflies to sell as traditional medicine.
The critically-endangered high brown fritillary saw numbers fall by 46% compared with 2011, and the endangered heath fritillary saw numbers halve.
